description: vbench seed corpus: dims-only SPARQL queries that run identically against the native materialized ledger (enterprise-sf01) and any R2RML/Iceberg virtual target. Every query is tagged and carries a (placeholder) BI question; expected_rows is exact where deterministic and a [min,max] range where join/filter/group cardinality depends on the dataset scale.

queries.bi_question: How many stores does the enterprise operate? (placeholder — confirm against BI catalog)
List stores with their id, name and store type. (placeholder)
Where are our stores located (city / region)? (placeholder)
Which are our most expensive products (list price over $100)? (placeholder)
How is our customer base distributed across segments? (placeholder)
